The Pope’s Exorcist (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,009,380Details
International Box Office $52,904,087
Worldwide Box Office $72,913,467
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,119,052
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,228,281
Total $2,347,333
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Inspired by the actual files of Father Gabriele Amorth, Chief Exorcist of the Vatican, The Pope’s Exorcist follows Amorth as he investigates a young boy’s terrifying possession and ends up uncovering a centuries-old conspiracy the Vatican has desperately tried to keep hidden.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,006,368 (45.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.22 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:27.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,178 opening theaters/3,178 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $21,874,972

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 14th, 2023 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: April 5th, 2023 (Wide), released as El exorcista del Papa (Spain)
April 5th, 2023 (Wide), released as El exorcista del Papa (Mexico)
April 6th, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
April 6th, 2023 (Wide) (Croatia)
April 6th, 2023 (Wide), released as Papežův vymítač (Czech Republic)
Video Release: May 2nd, 2023 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violent content, language, sexual references and some nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2770 (cert #54234), 2/15/2023)
Running Time: 103 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Non-Drama Biographies
Filming location (country): Ireland, Italy
Plot point: Biography, Exorcism, Possessed
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, 2.0 Entertainment, Loyola Productions
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom, Spain
Languages: English
